conversations.content: I have many items in my cart and want to clear out everything except for the electric toothbrush. Please remove the other items and place the order.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request to clear out everything except for the electric toothbrush, the first step will be to view the current items in the cart. After that, I will need to determine the product ID of the electric toothbrush to facilitate the removal of other items and proceed with the checkout for the toothbrush. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_cart()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The current items in the cart are:
1. TechBrand Wireless Mouse (ID: P001)
2. Backpack (ID: P017)
3. Electric Toothbrush (ID: P011)

To proceed, I will remove the TechBrand Wireless Mouse and Backpack (IDs: P001 and P017) from the cart and finalize the checkout for the Electric Toothbrush (ID: P011). 
I will first remove these two products.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[cart_remove_product(product_id="P001"), cart_remove_product(product_id="P017")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Product ID P001 removed from cart.
Product ID P017 removed from cart.

<function_thought>
The TechBrand Wireless Mouse (ID: P001) and Backpack (ID: P017) have been successfully removed from the cart. Now, I will proceed to checkout the Electric Toothbrush (ID: P011). 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[checkout_selected_cart(product_ids=["P011"])]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The checkout for the Electric Toothbrush (ID: P011) has been successfully completed. The user's request to clear the cart of all items except the toothbrush has been fulfilled. 
</function_thought>

<final_answer>
Your order for the Electric Toothbrush has been placed successfully! If there's anything else you need, feel free to ask.
</final_answer>
